kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=backend, url=http://localhost:3000, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: Name
kw.doc: :example: 'John Doe'

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3000/client path_url=/client headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '79', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"name": "Sra. Aylla Vieira", "cpf": "561.342.870-08", "policy": "Seguro Auto"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Numbers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to real numbers.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Name
kw.doc: :example: 'John Doe'

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3000/policy path_url=/policy headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '231', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"insurerCode": "SEG002", "policyNumber": "APO-541852", "productCode": "AUTO", "insuredDocument": "12345678901", "premiumAmount": 850.9, "coverageAmount": 50000, "effectiveStartDate": "2026-06-01", "effectiveEndDate": "2027-06-01"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.msg: ${json} = {'policyId': '6a18ca7b4024b290dec9fa78', 'registrationId': 'SRO-B3-2026-1780009595230', 'status': 'REGISTERED', 'message': 'Apólice registrada com sucesso no ambiente SRO/B3'}
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Numbers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to real numbers.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.arg: Apólice registrada com sucesso no ambiente SRO/B3
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.msg: ${json} = {'error': 'REQUIRED_FIELDS', 'message': 'Preencha todos os campos obrigatórios do registro SRO'}

kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to real numbers.

kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.
